commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds explicit requested provider IDs to realtime transcription capability resolution and threads Voice Call streaming provider IDs through Talk transcription config/session handling with regression tests.

PR surface: Source +84, Tests +276. Total +360 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main loses Voice Call streaming requested-provider IDs before Talk config/session provider resolution, and the PR body provides redacted live Gateway before/after output for the xAI failure.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] There is a narrow repair candidate: adjust the Talk catalog/provider-resolution handoff so the configured active provider is included when an active registry is partial, then rerun the focused Talk and capability-provider tests.
